chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1431 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4362/2022 (C/A) 07.12.2022 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Najaf Ali Janwri, Clerk of Municipal Committee, Khairpur is present on behalf of Accounts Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur and files compliance report together with three original cheques bearing No.38364886, 38364885 and 37211635 dated 07.12.2022, amounting Rs.4,28,054/- (Rupees four lac twenty eight thousand and fifty four), Rs.4,00,000/- (Rupees four lac) and Rs.3,00,000/- (Rupees three lac) respectively, making total of Rs.11,28,054/- (Rupees eleven lac twenty eight thousand and fifty four), in favour of the petitioner, being outstanding amount towards his retirement benefits. The original cheques are received by the petitioner, who is present in person, under acknowledgment on photocopies of the cheques. Since all remaining outstanding dues have been paid to the petitioner, listed application stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
